name: Hollowstone
description: Chisel a hidden lockbox into any cobblestone block — indistinguishable from plain stone until you sneak-click it and a small stone drawer slides out. Craft a Page of Secrets to find your stashes again: whoever holds a page sees floating markers over its owner's lockboxes, so a stolen page is a treasure map to another player's hoard. Program a four-stone press combination onto a box and even a thief who finds it stares at mute cobblestone.
